latestRelease.body:
This release marks the **stable release** of the `2025-11-25` revision of the Model Context Protocol.

The specification is available on the [official Model Context Protocol website](https://modelcontextprotocol.io/specification/2025-11-25).

For a detailed overview of changes, see [2025-11-25 changelog](https://modelcontextprotocol.io/specification/2025-11-25/changelog).

latestRelease.name: v1.29.0
latestRelease.body:
## What's Changed
* fix: treat v1.x as primary branch for npm latest tag (backport #1577) by @felixweinberger in https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk/pull/1749
* [v1.x] fix: disallow null (infinite) requested TTL by @LucaButBoring in https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk/pull/1339
* [v1.x] fix: add missing size field to ResourceSchema by @olaservo in https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk/pull/1575
* Add typings exports by @tdraier in https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk/pull/1623
* v1.x npm audit fix by @KKonstantinov in https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk/pull/1780
* v1.x #1623 follow up -add missing types to package.json by @KKonstantinov in https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk/pull/1773
* [v1.x backport] Allow servers / clients to advertise extensions in the capability object by @localden in https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk/pull/1811
* fix(stdio): always set windowsHide on Windows, not just in Electron by @jnMetaCode in https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk/pull/1640
* chore: bump version to 1.29.0 by @felixweinberger in https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk/pull/1820

## New Contributors
* @tdraier made their first contribution in https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk/pull/1623
* @jnMetaCode made their first contribution in https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk/pull/1640

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk/compare/v1.28.0...v1.29.0

latestRelease.name: v1.27.1
latestRelease.body:
## What's Changed
* [v1.x] fix: catch PydanticUserError when generating output schema (pydantic 2.13 compat) by @maxisbey in https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/python-sdk/pull/2435
* [v1.x] fix(auth): coerce empty-string optional URL fields to None in OAuthClientMetadata by @felixweinberger in https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/python-sdk/pull/2405
* [v1.x] build: restrict httpx to <1.0.0 by @maxisbey in https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/python-sdk/pull/2559
* [v1.x] refactor: import SSEError from httpx_sse public API by @maxisbey in https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/python-sdk/pull/2561


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/python-sdk/compare/v1.27.0...v1.27.1

2713.reason: schema type fix — NumberSchema.minimum/maximum/default should be number not integer; documented in SKILL-tools-resources-prompts.md

2714.reason: internal build fix, not a user-facing bug

2726.title: Clarify resultType is required; reframe absent-field handling as backward compat
2726.reason: doc clarification for resultType field; 0 reactions, 1 comment; closed; no workaround pattern needed

2727.title: Disambiguate HTTP backward-compat fallbacks: inspect 400/404 body before falling back
2727.reason: substantive protocol bug — clients that blindly fall back to legacy SSE on any 400 will misdetect modern servers; added body-inspection guidance to SKILL-transport.md

2728.title: Clarify notifications/message is request-scoped, not delivered on subscriptions/listen
2728.reason: protocol behavior clarification: notifications/message must not appear on subscriptions/listen streams; added scoping note to SKILL-servers.md

2730.reason: internal SEP lifecycle housekeeping, not a bug

2690.title: Change error response status from 400 to 404 for invalid sessions
2690.reason: server MUST return 404 (not 400) for invalid MCP-Session-Id; 404 triggers client re-initialization per spec; 400 does not; added as Rule 9 in rules/mcp-server-impl.md

2684.reason: 0 reactions, 0 comments; the log routing rule (notifications/message is request-scoped, not broadcast) is already documented in SKILL-servers.md via #2728

2475.reason: log routing rule (notifications/message is request-scoped per streamable HTTP) already documented in SKILL-servers.md via #2728; PR #2684 is the associated doc fix
